name: Hungarian Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup White wine (Sauterne or Chardonnay quite nice)
2 cups V-8 cocktail juice (or juice from previously cooked vegetables)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the vegetables by cutting the onion and celery finely and leaving the potatoes and carrots in fairly large pieces.
2. Bring barley and peas to a rolling boil in water. Add the prepared vegetables, wine, and seasonings.
3. Simmer until the barley and all the vegetables are very tender, about 2 - 2 1/2 hours.
4. About thirty minutes before serving, add the V-8 juice or vegetable stock and a "roux" made of butter and flour to the soup.
5. Stir carefully as the soup thickens, ensuring it does not stick to the pot.
